purpose: Source-of-truth manifest for uploaded original Pop WiFi intro preset HTML files. Do not reinterpret designs. Preserve original frame, motion, particles, CTA, bottom bar, and equalizer behavior.
rules: Original design fidelity is the highest priority.
Do not replace original design with generic shared frame/CTA/bottom-bar styling.
Do not merge all preset particle/motion code into one global file.
Implement source-faithful renderer modules in batches of 10.
Fix original errors separately and document every fix.

uploadedFiles.role: Consolidated master source for presets 01 through 50
Extended prototype source for presets 31 through 60

rangePriority.notes: Preset 01 exists in the consolidated all_50 source. Do not invent if not found elsewhere.
Use split 02-10 source for detailed implementation and all_50 for consistency validation.
Use split 11-30 source for detailed implementation and all_50 for consistency validation.
Cross-check all_50 and 31-60 prototype. Preserve all_50 if there is a conflict for 31-50.
Future extension source only. Not part of the current 01-50 physical preset completion.

doNotUse: one massive app.css with all preset designs
one massive preset-preview.js with all particles and frames
generic frame plus generic CTA for all presets
preferred: iframe or isolated preview root to prevent CSS/keyframe collisions

nextBatch.task: Extract original-source-faithful modules from presets_02_10.html, one preset at a time, without changing design language.
completionCriteria: renderer keeps original bottom bar and equalizer
any original error fix is separately logged
